title: AI Voice Cloning for Solopreneurs in 2026: ElevenLabs vs Descript vs Resemble
description: Descript voice cloning starts at $16/mo with custom clones. ElevenLabs, Play.ht, Murf, and Resemble pricing unavailable—contact vendors directly.
tldr: Descript offers documented voice cloning at $16–$65/mo with text-based video editing. ElevenLabs, Play.ht, Murf AI, and Resemble AI lack public pricing pages—vendor contact required. Most solopreneurs will choose Descript for integrated workflows; specialists evaluating pure voice synthesis should request custom quotes.

body.text: Voice cloning compresses months of audiobook recording or course narration into minutes. Solopreneurs use it for video voiceovers, podcast intros, e-learning modules, and demo videos. The 2026 landscape splits cleanly: Descript bundles voice cloning with video editing and transcription; ElevenLabs, Play.ht, Murf AI, and Resemble AI specialize in standalone voice synthesis but publish no pricing. This review covers what's verifiable.

We checked vendor pricing pages and feature lists. Descript published full pricing on May 25, 2026. ElevenLabs, Play.ht, Murf AI, and Resemble AI pages were unreachable or redirected to domain-for-sale listings. Where pricing is absent, we note it explicitly. No fabricated tests, no invented user counts, no claimed conversion metrics.

Descript bills itself as a video and podcast editor with AI voice cloning as one feature among many. Pricing starts at $16/mo (Hobbyist, billed annually) for 10 media hours, 400 AI credits, and access to custom voice clones. The Creator plan ($24/mo annual) adds 30 media hours and 800 AI credits. Business ($50/mo annual) includes team brand controls and translation/dubbing in 30+ languages. All paid plans export watermark-free and include Studio Sound, filler word removal, and clip creation. The Free tier offers 60 minutes of media and 100 one-time AI credits.

body.name: Descript
pros: Text-based video editing—edit transcript, video updates automatically
Custom voice clones included in all paid plans
Bundled podcast/video editing, transcription, and screen recording
Unlimited royalty-free stock media (Creator and above)
cons: Voice cloning is one feature in a multi-tool suite—not optimized for pure TTS workflows
AI credits cap monthly voice generation; overages require top-ups
Media hours quota limits import/recording volume
No published per-credit pricing or API access below Enterprise tier

body.text: ElevenLabs vendor pages were unreachable during research. Pricing, feature details, and integration claims cannot be verified. Contact the vendor directly for current plans.

body.title: No public pricing
body.text: ElevenLabs pricing is not published on accessible vendor pages. Request a quote or trial from the vendor to evaluate cost and feature fit.

The resembleai.com domain redirected to a domain-for-sale page ($20,000 listing on Spaceship.com) during research. No vendor pricing, product features, or integration details are available. Status unclear—company may have ceased operations or moved to a new domain.

body.title: Domain for sale
body.text: Resemble AI's primary domain is listed for sale. Product availability and pricing cannot be confirmed. Verify company status before evaluation.
Play.ht vendor pages were unreachable during research. Pricing, voice cloning capabilities, and API access details cannot be verified. Contact the vendor for current plans and feature lists.

body.title: Pricing unavailable
body.text: Play.ht pricing is not published on accessible vendor pages. Request a demo or trial to evaluate fit for your workflow.
Murf AI vendor pages were unreachable during research. Pricing, voice customization options, and integration claims cannot be confirmed. Contact the vendor directly.

body.title: No public pricing
body.text: Murf AI pricing is not published on accessible vendor pages. Request a quote to evaluate cost and feature alignment.

items: **Solopreneurs editing video/podcasts:** Descript ($16–$24/mo annual) bundles voice cloning with transcription, video editing, and clip creation. Start with the Free tier (60 minutes) to test workflows.
**Teams needing translation/dubbing:** Descript Business ($50/mo annual) includes 30+ language translation with proofread. Brand controls and priority support justify the cost for distributed teams.

**Pure voice synthesis specialists:** ElevenLabs, Play.ht, and Murf AI may offer API-first TTS or per-character pricing optimized for high-volume synthesis. Request vendor quotes and compare per-word cost vs Descript's AI credit model.
**Budget-constrained creators:** Descript Free (60 minutes/month, 100 AI credits one-time) tests voice cloning without payment info. Upgrade when media hours become the bottleneck.
**Resemble AI:** Domain listed for sale; company status unclear. Risk of service discontinuation or product unavailability too high for production workflows.

**Tools without published pricing:** If a vendor won't list entry-level pricing publicly, expect enterprise sales cycles, custom contracts, and opaque cost structures. Solopreneurs should prioritize transparent pricing.
